privileged_info_summary: The task setup_logging_framework@1 involves migrating a synthetic Maven project (library-app) from System.out.println statements to SLF4J with Logback logging. The project directory is at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/library-app and contains 5 Java files across 4 packages (model, repository, service, util). Four of these files (LibraryApp.java, BookService.java, BookRepository.java, SearchEngine.java) contain System.out/err.println calls that must be replaced with SLF4J logger calls, while Book.java should be ignored. The expected dependencies are org.slf4j:slf4j-api:2.0.9 and ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.4.14, both legitimate versions published in Maven Central Repository (2023-09-03 and 2023-12-01 respectively). The data is entirely synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh.
